name: get_python_agent_example
description:
Browse and retrieve full example source code for various agents built with LiveKit Agents for Python, from the repository at http://github.com/livekit-examples/python-agents-examples

Without name parameter: Returns index of all 100+ examples with metadata (title, description, tags, difficulty, category).

With name parameter: Fetches full source code for the specific example directory. Do not use github URLs from another tools, check list of examples first using this tool.

Examples of names: "avatars/hedra/dynamically_created_avatar/agent.py", "basics/tool_calling.py", "complex-agents/drive-thru/agent.py"

name.description: Example file path (e.g., "basics/tool_calling.py", "complex-agents/drive-thru/agent.py"). Omit to get full index.

format.description: Response format. "markdown" (default) returns human-readable markdown optimized for LLM consumption. "json" returns structured JSON for programmatic use.
